basic_details.job_title: NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Raipur (NIT Raipur)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Raipur (NIT Raipur) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 14 July 2026 on the official website of NIT Raipur. A total of 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) vacancy has been announced through the NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech. in Mining or Civil Engineering with minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA (out of 10)
qualification.details: B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech. in Mining or Civil Engineering with minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA (out of 10) in B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- per month + HRA for first two years and Rs. 42,000/- per month + HRA for third year

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Raipur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Vacancy Details 2026
NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech. in Mining or Civil Engineering with minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA (out of 10) in B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech.

content_sections.heading: NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Age Limit 2026
NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Rs. 37,000/- per month + HRA for first two years and Rs. 42,000/- per month + HRA for third year

content_sections.heading: NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 26th July 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech. degree in Mining or Civil Engineering with a minimum of 60% marks or a CGPA of 6.5 out of 10.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Research Fellow post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Research Fellow position is Rs. 37,000/- per month plus HRA for the first two years, and Rs. 42,000/- per month plus HRA for the third year.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Junior Research Fellow in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through email. Candidates need to send their application along with required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where is NIT Raipur located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Raipur (NIT Raipur) is located in Raipur, Chhattisgarh, with the pincode 492010.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Junior Research Fellow recruitment at NIT Raipur is 6463.
